name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, late payments cause supplier penalties. We send alerts for upcoming deadlines instead of manual tracking of payment schedules.
problem_solved: Late payments leading to supplier penalties and cash flow issues.
features: manual entry of vendor payment schedules
